full_text: Heart beats fast, colors and promises How to be brave, how can I love when I'm afraid to fall But watching you stand alone All of my doubt suddenly goes away somehow One step closer I have died everyday waiting for you Darling don't be afraid, I have loved you for a thousand years I love you for a thousand more Time stands still, beauty and all she is I will be brave, I will not let anything take away Standing in front of me Every breath, every hour has come to this One step closer I have died everyday waiting for you Darling don't be afraid, I have loved you for a thousand years I love you for a thousand more And all along I believed I would find you Time has brought my heart to me I have loved you for a thousand years I love you for a thousand more One step closer One step closer I have died everyday waiting for you Darling don't be afraid, I have loved you for a thousand years I love you for a thousand more And all along I believed I would find you Time has brought my heart to me I have loved you for a thousand more I love you for a thousand more I love you for a thousand more Thanks for watching!

summary: In this deeply emotional and impassioned piece, the speaker expresses an unwavering devotion that transcends time. With poetic language filled with rich metaphors like "heart beats fast" and vivid imagery of love's enduring nature—saying they have loved someone for a thousand years despite never having met in reality—the piece conveys an intense longing intertwined with fearlessness. The speaker implores their beloved not to hesitate, assuring them that true bravery lies within and the beauty of time has brought this heart closer every day without finding what it sought until now. Despite a tone oscillating between hopeful yearning and resolute resolve—"I have died everyday waiting for you... I will be brave," they emphasize their enduring affection, while also acknowledging life's uncertainties with the phrase "But watching you stand alone." Ultimately, it is this speaker who seeks to conquer fear through love itself.
